<?php namespace Illuminate\Cache\Console; use Illuminate\Console\MigrationGeneratorCommand; use Symfony\Component\Console\Attribute\AsCommand; #[AsCommand(name: 'make:cache-table', aliases: ['cache:table'])] class CacheTableCommand extends MigrationGeneratorCommand { /** * The console command name. * * @var string */ protected $name = 'make:cache-table'; /** * The console command name aliases. * * @var array */ protected $aliases = ['cache:table']; /** * The console command description. * * @var string */ protected $description = 'Create a migration for the cache database table'; /** * Get the migration table name. * * @return string */ protected function migrationTableName() { return 'cache'; } /** * Get the path to the migration stub file. * * @return string */ protected function migrationStubFile() { return __DIR__.'/stubs/cache.stub'; } }
